title: No Ender Pearl Damage
description: Removes the damage that the player receives when using an ender pearl. [Supports 1.20.2 to 1.21.2]
body:
# ARCHIVED! THIS PROJECT WILL NO LONGER RECEIVE UPDATES
I have decided to end this project because its incredibly hard to achieve zero pearl damage without any bugs in vanilla minecraft. It will no longer receive updates, and support will not be provided. Use this datapack/mod at your own risk, they contain lots of bugs.

### DESCRIPTION

This datapack disables damage that a player receives after using an ender pearl.

### INSTALLATION GUIDE

- go to your saves folder located here on Windows:
```
C:\Users(your name)\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\saves
```
  put the zipped file in the data packs folder, and either restart your world or execute      /reload
